# DR Congo vs Uzbekistan Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Group K

DR Congo vs Uzbekistan clash in Atlanta for their must-win 2026 World Cup Group K finale. Predicted lineups, team news, tactical breakdown and score prediction.

Updated on June 26, 2026 5:35AM EST

Share

By:

Pierre Courtin

Adam Zdroik

Updated on June 26, 2026 5:35AM EST

# DR Congo vs Uzbekistan Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Group K

This is a must-win for DR Congo and close to a dead end for Uzbekistan. The Congolese sit on a single point and need to beat Uzbekistan at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta to climb to four, which would put them right in the mix for second or a best-third spot, with the Colombia vs Portugal result shaping the rest. Uzbekistan, on zero points and a minus-seven goal difference after two heavy defeats, are all but out: even a win wou

## PREVIEW | DR Congo vs Uzbekistan: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 28/06)

Go to the comments section Add to your bookmarksShare this article

DR Congo and Uzbekistan face each other this Sunday at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium of the World Cup. The match will be broadcast live at 00:30 on BBC Two.

Last time out, DR Congo slipped to a 1-0 defeat against Colombia (World Cup 2026). In their last encounter, Uzbekistan were beaten 5-0 by Portugal (World Cup 2026).

Live ScorePreviewPredictionLineupsHead 2 HeadLive StreamStats

DR Congo vs Uzbekistan lineups are yet to be confirmed for Group K Match 72 at the FIFA World Cup 2026. The DR Congo national football team and Uzbekistan national football team meet on June 27, 2026, at Atlanta Stadium, with kickoff at 19:30 ET. This projected lineup tracker covers the starting XI, formations, bench options, managers, and late matchday updates. This DR Congo national football team vs Uzbekistan national football team lineups tracker stays projected until official match sheets arrive.

FIFA lists Congo DR vs Uzbekistan as Group K Match 72 at Atlanta Stadium, with kickoff at 23:30 UTC on June 27. Ticketmaster lists the local kickoff at 7:30 PM at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta. DR Congo earned a 1-1 draw with Portugal earlier in Group K, while Uzbekistan entered the tournament under Fabio Cannavaro as a World Cup debutant. Official matchday lineups remain projected until both teams r

news_items.text:
Congo DR v Uzbekistan | World Cup | Match Preview

Back

# Congo DR v Uzbekistan: Live stream, team news, tickets and more

Published12 Apr 2026

Share

Congo DR and Uzbekistan will close out their respective Group K campaigns in Atlanta.

## Congo DR v UzbekistanCongo DR v Uzbekistan

https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289273/400021500 https://www.fifa.com/en/match-centre/match/17/285023/289273/400021500

## Group KGroup K

Saturday, 27 June | Atlanta Stadium

## Kick-off timeKick-off time

19:30 (Atlanta) | 00:30 Sunday (Kinshasa) | 04:30 Sunday (Tashkent)

FIFA World Cup 2026™First Stage · Group K · Houston Stadium06/17/2026PortugalCongo DR17:00

FIFA World Cup 2026™First Stage · Group K · Mexico City Stadium06/18/2026UzbekistanColombia02:00

---

### The matchThe match

Congo DR and Uzbekistan will bring their FIFA World Cup 2026™ Group K campaigns to a close here, as the pair meet in Atlanta. The African nation ended 52 years of waiting to play at the finals with a dramatic victory over Jamaica at the FIFA Play-Off Tournament back in March. Uzbekistan, meanwhile, made history by reaching their maiden finals after losing just once in 16 AFC qualifiers.

The wi

# DR Congo vs Uzbekistan Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Group K

This is a must-win for DR Congo and close to a dead end for Uzbekistan. The Congolese sit on a single point and need to beat Uzbekistan at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta to climb to four, which would put them right in the mix for second or a best-third spot, with the Colombia vs Portugal result shaping the rest. ## PREVIEW | DR Congo vs Uzbekistan: team news, lineups, predictions (World Cup 28/06)

Go to the comments section Add to your bookmarksShare this article

DR Congo and Uzbekistan face each other this Sunday at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium of the World Cup. The match will be broadcast live at 00:30 on BBC Two.

Last time out, DR Congo slipped to a 1-0 defeat against Colombia (World Cup 2026). In their last encounter, Uzbekistan were beaten 5-0 by Portugal (World Cup 2026).

FIFA lists Congo DR vs Uzbekistan as Group K Match 72 at Atlanta Stadium, with kickoff at 23:30 UTC on June 27. Ticketmaster lists the local kickoff at 7:30 PM at Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta. ### The matchThe match

Congo DR and Uzbekistan will bring their FIFA World Cup 2026™ Group K campaigns to a close here, as the pair meet in Atlanta. The African nation ended 52 years of waiting to play at the finals with a dramatic victory over Jamaica at the FIFA Play-Off Tournament back in March. Uzbekistan, meanwhile, made history by reaching their maiden finals after losing just once in 16 AFC qualifiers.
